title: The Fight Spreads Across the Park
description: On pages 17–18, the fight spreads across the park focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as the Straw Hats crash into Arlong Park, and the fight against Arlong’s fish-men begins in earnest.
scene: On pages 17–18, the fight spreads across the park focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as the Straw Hats crash into Arlong Park, and the fight against Arlong’s fish-men begins in earnest.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't act so rashly! Going into the sea is exactly what these guys want!

dialogue.speaker: Nojiko
dialogue.text: There's only one way to save Luffy Right Now...!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You mean we have to beat these guys to a pulp on land first and then jump into the sea?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ah, one of these games, huh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ughh... crap, all my energy feels like it's being sucked out...

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
